title: The Man at the Bar

statement: A man walked into a bar and asked the bartender for a glass of water. The bartender pointed a gun at him. The man said 'Thank you' and left. Why?
truth: The man had persistent hiccups and was desperate to stop them. He thought drinking water might help, so he stopped at a bar. The bartender noticed the hiccups and decided to cure them by giving the man a fright—pointing a gun at him. The shock stopped the hiccups, so the man no longer needed the water, said 'Thank you,' and left.
